after having an iphone 17 since it’s come out, my review differs slightly. battery is worse. terrible even. doesn’t last close to a day. camera doesn’t quickly open. it is buggy and has slow processing speed. it’s like it’s made with cheaper parts.

got iphone 17 white, in my opinion its a evergreen color and wont be boring with time. got apple care with it, dailyobjects case and screenguard from local shop. but the ios is buggy, and apple intelligence is useless, even siri cant do complex tasks. so yea but other than that best phone. coz i upgraded from iphone xr which i used for 5 years. so im so happy with the phone, its camera, best battery. go with it blindly, love its display. best apple phone with base 256gb storage. dropped it twice which was scary drop, but still not a scratch on screen/back. gonna rock this phone easily for 3 years.
